mapper.select: SELECT performance_id AS performanceId, p_title AS pTitle, p_location AS pLocation, poster_url AS posterUrl, created_per AS createdPer FROM PERFORMANCES ORDER BY created_per DESC
SELECT performance_id AS performanceId, p_title AS pTitle, p_location AS pLocation, poster_url AS posterUrl, created_per AS createdPer FROM PERFORMANCES WHERE performance_id = #{performanceId}

SELECT pr.round_id AS roundId, pr.performance_id AS performanceId, p.p_title AS pTitle, pr.round_time AS roundTime, pr.round_status AS roundStatus FROM PERFORMANCE_ROUND pr JOIN PERFORMANCES p ON pr.performance_id = p.performance_id WHERE pr.performance_id = #{performanceId} ORDER BY pr.round_time

SELECT pr.round_id AS roundId, pr.performance_id AS performanceId, p.p_title AS pTitle, pr.round_time AS roundTime, pr.round_status AS roundStatus FROM PERFORMANCE_ROUND pr JOIN PERFORMANCES p ON pr.performance_id = p.performance_id WHERE pr.round_id = #{roundId}
